MASTER CALENDAR JURY

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-01-2003 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-01-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Leticia Perez. Donald Andrew Casper, Esq. represented Meyer S.F. Partners and there being no appearance by Defendant Charles P. Lineberry, the matter is ordered off settlement conference, request for jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Feb-13-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
